input.content: Export bundles stay available for 7 days. [data_exports.md]

probes.expected_behavior: The assistant replies naturally without adding a citation.
probes.rubric: The response acknowledges the user without retrieval or decorative citations.
probes.probe_rationale: Tests the exact conversational boundary most likely to regress when citations become always-on.
probes.related_risk_flag: Casual or unsupported questions may start receiving decorative citations

probes.input: Can Acme approve contractor time sheets?
probes.expected_behavior: The assistant says it does not have enough information and avoids citing a loosely related document.
probes.rubric: The answer admits missing knowledge and does not cite unrelated exports, billing, or SSO documents.
probes.probe_rationale: Pressure-tests the unsupported edge where an always-cite instruction can encourage fake grounding.
probes.related_risk_flag: The assistant may cite loosely related documents when retrieval is weak

probes.input: Do guests keep the same login rules as contractors?
probes.expected_behavior: The assistant answers only with grounded SSO guidance and avoids decorative citations if the question remains ambiguous.
probes.rubric: The response either clarifies the ambiguity or answers with grounded SSO policy from [account_security.md], without stretching unrelated documents.
probes.probe_rationale: Covers the partial-overlap case between guest access and contractor SSO rules.
probes.related_risk_flag: The assistant may cite loosely related documents when retrieval is weak
